plan_title: Gmail Orders PO Extractor (Per-Supplier XLSX Emails)
plan_description: Finds Gmail emails with 'Orders' in the subject from the last 30 days, extracts purchase order line items from attachments, compiles per-supplier XLSX summary tables, and emails one XLSX per supplier to you, followed by a final confirmation email.

data: - Search Gmail for messages where the subject line contains the keyword 'Orders'.
- Limit the search to emails from the last 30 days.
- For each matching email, collect all attachments (any file type).
- Only process attachments that appear to be purchase orders; ignore non-purchase-order attachments.
actions: - For each matching email, evaluate each attachment and determine whether it is a purchase order; ignore non-purchase-order attachments.
- For each purchase order attachment, extract purchase order line items and create one output row per line item.
- For each extracted line-item row, extract the following fields: Order Date/Time, Order_ID, Vendor, QTY, Cost, Amount.
- Normalize extracted values so they are consistent across vendors (e.g., date/time format; numeric formatting for QTY, Cost, Amount).
- If the agent cannot confidently extract a field for a row, leave that field blank.
- Set Status = 'Complete' if Order Date/Time, Order_ID, Vendor, QTY, Cost, and Amount are all present for that row.
- Set Status = 'Needs review' if any of Order Date/Time, Order_ID, Vendor, QTY, Cost, or Amount is missing for that row.
- When Status = 'Needs review', append a short note inside the Status value listing which field(s) are missing or unclear (e.g., "Needs review: missing Vendor, Cost").
- Group all extracted rows by Vendor (supplier).
- For each Vendor group, generate a separate XLSX file containing only that Vendor’s rows.
- In each XLSX, include columns in this exact order: Order Date/Time, Order_ID, Vendor, QTY, Cost, Amount, Status.
output: - Produce one XLSX summary table per Vendor (supplier).
- Each XLSX must include a header row with: Order Date/Time, Order_ID, Vendor, QTY, Cost, Amount, Status.
- Each XLSX must include one row per extracted purchase order line item.
delivery: - Send one email per Vendor to meiribarak@gmail.com.
- Attach that Vendor’s XLSX summary file to the email.
- Use an email subject that includes the Vendor name and indicates it is an 'Orders' summary (e.g., "Orders summary – <Vendor>").
- After all Vendor emails are sent, send a final confirmation email to meiribarak@gmail.com stating how many Vendors were processed and how many total line-item rows were extracted.
processing_steps: - Find candidate emails (subject contains 'Orders', last 30 days).
- Identify which attachments are purchase orders.
- Extract line items and required fields from each purchase order attachment.
- Apply Status rules and missing-field notes.
- Email each XLSX to the user, then send a final confirmation email.

resolved_user_inputs.value: any (process only those that appear to be purchase orders)
leave blanks; Status includes missing-field note when Needs review
Complete if all required fields present; otherwise Needs review with missing-field note
